response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms, but lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of professional C++ experience on Windows required for this role. While they have C++ exposure (e.g., National Instruments), it is not a primary focus, and their recent work is heavily skewed toward JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages. Domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking is also absent.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals and polyglot programming experience
Experience with low-latency systems and database management (SQL, MongoDB)
Demonstrated ability to work in capital-markets-adjacent environments (RIDE Capital, Dunnhumby) though not in a C++ context
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience (5–10 years required)
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
Primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and other languages, not C++ on Windows

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/financial systems
